label: Dosha
description: A fundamental energetic principle in Ayurveda that governs transformation, digestion, and metabolic heat through the element of fire.
rationale: Pitta is categorized as a 'Type of Humor' and is a constituent part of the 'Doshas'. It is characterized by fire and governs the digestive system and metabolic transformation, fitting the broader concept of an Ayurvedic biological force.
